title: Starbucks Drive-Thru
scene: George at Starbucks drive-through window. Hands over card. Barista (cofounder or friend dressed casually) hands coffee back.
action: Barista: "You're one of those guys still doing everything by hand?" George takes coffee, shrugs, turns to camera with deadpan look.
shootNotes: Use actual car. Phone mounted on dashboard or held by passenger. Natural light. One take usually enough — the awkwardness IS the hook.

title: Gym, No Weights
scene: George at Lifetime Fitness. Empty barbell. Doing reps with no weight.
action: Big guy walks past, looks confused: "Lots of reps but no weight? That's pointless." George stops, turns to camera, smirks: "That's what running your business without AI looks like."
shootNotes: Lifetime Fitness Edmond. Need 1 friend (the 'big guy' character). Off-peak hour. One angle, locked tripod.

title: Family Dinner Phone Toss
scene: George at dinner table with family. Phone buzzes repeatedly. Family talking, getting interrupted.
action: Wife or partner gives The Look. George tosses phone (gentle — onto chair or pillow). Turns to camera: "Yeah. That's the problem."
shootNotes: Real family setting if comfortable, or staged with friends. Soft warm light. Phone needs to be visibly buzzing. Practice the toss.

title: Office Chaos
scene: George at desk. Phone ringing. Laptop with 30+ unread emails. Cofounder walks in. Another person knocks. Phone rings again.
action: George looks at all of it, exhales, slowly turns to camera. Holds the look for a beat.
feel: "This is every day" moment. No words needed.
shootNotes: Need 2 people walking in/around. Real phone ringing (timer to call yourself). Real laptop with real or fake inbox. Most reusable pre-hook in the library.

title: Multi-Location Teleport
scene: Same outfit. Same energy. Walking into 4 different locations in fast succession.
action: Cut 1: Walking out of Quintessa office. Cut 2: Walking into Tellers at The National. Cut 3: Walking into Café Evoke in Edmond. Cut 4: Sitting down at desk again. Each cut 0.5–1 sec. Lands on you at desk turning to camera.
shootNotes: Same outfit across all 4 cuts. Shoot in same day. Phone gimbal helpful. Each location: 1 walk-in shot, 1 turn shot. ~30 seconds per location.
